diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Maya. How can I help?
[Caller] Hi. I'm really stuck. I can't log in, my account is locked, and I don't have my UID. I lost access to the email on file too.
[Agent] I hear you — that's a tough combination. Let's work through this together. I can help you recover access using what you do remember about the account. A few questions, and I'll cross-match them against our records. Ready?
[Caller] OK, yes.
[Agent] Great. First — what server region did you play on? America, Europe, Asia, or TW HK MO?
[Caller] Europe.
[Agent] Got it. Roughly what Adventure Rank were you when you last played?
[Caller] Around 53, I think.
[Agent] Perfect. What was the last 5-star character you pulled — either wished or from a banner?
[Caller] Venti. Definitely Venti, I was really happy about that one.
[Agent] Love Venti. One more — what device were you playing on primarily?
[Caller] An iPhone 13.
[Agent] Wonderful. Let me run this through the recovery search. Server region Europe, AR around 53, last 5-star Venti, device iPhone 13. One moment... I have a high-confidence match — UID 708817234, name on file is Viktor Ivanov. Does that sound right?
[Caller] Yes! That's me!
[Agent] Beautiful. I can now initiate a secure knowledge-based account recovery for this UID. Per our policy, this type of recovery has a 24-hour verification window — during that time, we'll also send a notice to the old email as a fraud-prevention step. At the end of the window, if there's no dispute, we'll help you attach a new email address and reset the password. The recovery case ID is REC7A4B1F9C. Does that all sound good?
[Caller] Yes, that's exactly what I need. Thank you so much.
[Agent] My pleasure, Viktor. I also want to set you up for success going forward — once you're back in, I'd recommend linking a second email or a phone number as a backup. I'll email you a step-by-step at the new address you provide. What email would you like to use going forward?
[Caller] viktor.new at email dot com.
[Agent] Noted. You'll get setup instructions once the verification window closes. Thank you for your patience today — I know it's been frustrating.
[Caller] Honestly, this is the most helpful support call I've ever had. Thank you, Maya.
[Agent] That means a lot. Safe travels in Teyvat!
